block_01: This method was the result of hard work and a lot of research by an American economist Ralph Elliott. Though it may seem scarily complex, once it is well studied, this method may uncover some interesting insights into the way financial markets work.
block_02: Learn how you may apply the five-wave Elliott structure on the charts. This trading method takes time to master, but it may be used on any asset and any timeframe, which might be useful to some traders. The main difficulty lies in determining the waves correctly.
block_03: Check out the full article to learn how to find this structure on the charts.
